hero.body: Artists can display their masterpieces, and buyers can discover and acquire one-of-a-kind work from a global community.

ecommerce.body: A complete commerce layer built for creators — list a piece, set your price, and reach collectors worldwide with zero friction.

howItWorks.title: From studio to sold in three steps.
howItWorks.body: No agents, no gatekeepers. Upload your art, reach a global audience of collectors, and get paid — keeping almost all of it.

steps.title: List your work
steps.body: Upload pieces, set your price and publish a storefront in under five minutes.

steps.title: Get discovered
steps.body: Land in curated drops and collector feeds matched to your style and medium.

steps.title: Get paid
steps.body: Instant payouts the moment a piece sells — and you keep 95% of every sale.

trusted.title: Trusted by
trusted.body: Our growth hackers, studios and galleries already build their craft on Pallet Ross.

storyHeadline.lead: Whether you're an artist looking to sell your work or buyer seeking
storyHeadline.tail: pieces connects you to a world of creativity & commerce.

vision.title: Our vision for any art technology.
vision.body: We're building the connective tissue between creators, collectors and the tools that move culture forward.

community.title: You will find yourself among us
community.body: Dive into a dynamic community where artists and buyers seamlessly merge.

bento.title: Every piece of art tells a story.

marketplace.title: Marketplace for Creativity.
marketplace.body: Browse curated drops from emerging and established artists, updated daily.

integrations.title: Everything you already use, in one dock.

membership.title: Membership
membership.body: Pick a plan that grows with your practice. Cancel or switch anytime.

featureCards.title: Meets new people
featureCards.body: Find collaborators, mentors and collectors who get your work.

featureCards.title: Archive of new arts
featureCards.body: Every drop preserved — a living catalogue of the marketplace.
